data.title: Microservices Infrastructure
data.description: Spotify's architecture leverages a distributed system with hundreds of microservices.
data.technical_spec: Each microservice is designed to handle specific tasks with APIs for communication.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Utilizes load balancing to efficiently distribute incoming network traffic across multiple servers.
data.technical_spec: Nginx and HAProxy are often used to manage traffic flow, ensuring minimal downtime and high availability.

data.title: Scalability
data.description: Spotify's system is built to scale horizontally to manage user demand efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates Kubernetes for scaling and deploying containers.

data.title: Data Management
data.description: Employs various databases to store vast amounts of user data and song catalogs.
data.technical_spec: Mix of SQL and NoSQL databases like Cassandra and Postgres.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses CDNs to ensure fast delivery of music and assets globally.
data.technical_spec: Integrates with providers like Akamai for caching and delivering content.
